horoscope: The Moon spends much of today in your sector of work and routines, dear Aries, highlighting your daily affairs and desire to be useful. You can get your life straightened out in small ways now, although there can be some pressure in the first part of the day. You don't have to ignore your motivation to set things right, but it's a good idea to pace yourself. The things you haven't done or unsettled matters can interfere with productivity, but feeling overwhelmed tends to keep you in limbo, so aim to focus on one thing at a time. As the day advances, you can find it easier to detach, and you can be especially practical yet also progressive in your approach, a great combination. You can feel lighter, happier, and freer to make good choices for yourself.

Expressing yourself and sharing can be a strong draw today, dear Taurus. However, sensitivity on a social level can lead to quick reactions early today, which can heat things up. Getting things out into the open can be purging, but impatience can be a problem when waiting to address issues may be better. You may need to rely on others who do not necessarily see eye to eye with you. Still, interactions may end up revealing hidden desires. And, as the day advances, it's easier to express yourself more freely and detach from tension. Activities that feed your mind and spirit are most rewarding.

You can feel quite motivated to bring order or harmony to your home or personal life today, dear Gemini. Early today, it might not be easy getting over frustrations. However, allowing them to motivate you to make changes or put an irritating situation behind you can be productive. While clearing the air may seem to be what you need, there's a tendency to be too defensive to make much progress, so waiting it out may be best. As the day advances, it's easier to tune into the work of the Moon in your solar fourth house: building up your self-confidence. You may channel your energy in satisfying ways while also aiming to center yourself and conserve it for busier days ahead.

You're curious and drawn to mentally engaging activities again today, dear Cancer, but early today, it can be difficult to concentrate. Keep in mind that rushing through your tasks will more than likely lead to mistakes and disagreements at this time. Aim to get in better touch with your true desires before taking action. It can be rather easy to detach yourself as the day advances, and you can gain a pleasant, helpful perspective through a friend or new information that comes your way. While you want to be heard, you're also very willing to listen. There can be a nice focus on connecting, communicating, and learning.

Your comfort needs assume special importance today, dear Leo. Early today, tensions about boundaries, money, power dynamics, or respect can surface as the Moon opposes Mars. Whims are compelling, but you can also feel unsatisfied if you sense you're out of balance. It's best to avoid impulsive moves until you have a better understanding of your needs. As the day advances, however, you're more interested in what you can improve. You may be thinking of new business paths or ways to grow what you already have in place. There's the potential for an emotional release of sorts.

The Moon spends a lot of the day in your sign, dear Virgo, and you're in the spotlight. In the first half of the day, differences and problem areas are in strong focus, however, and it may not be easy to see around them. You may need to get something off your chest. You are inclined to go your own way, but you also seek acknowledgment from others, which is complicated. Fortunately, once over this hump, it's a good time for learning something important by observation. You are quick to pick up on what is expected of you, yet you march to your own inner drummer, somehow taking the lead and owning it, too. Later today, the Moon moves into your solar second house, and you're settling in.

The Moon spends much of the day in your privacy sector, dear Libra, and you're taking a step back from the usual activity. It's best to aim for balance as much as possible. In the first part of the day, you could feel torn as the Moon opposes Mars, but getting in touch with true needs and wants should be a priority. Remind yourself that you need some breathing room. As the day progresses, aim to clear your head of distractions and focus on what truly matters to you. You are drawing energy from your dreams and reflections, and you can accomplish much in a quiet way. The Moon enters your sign late today, bringing your emotions to the surface.

In the first half of the day, there can be some feelings of blocks, dear Scorpio. While you may want to push ahead with personal plans, you could encounter resistance. There may be feelings of unrest, and it would be wise to address frustrations. You may vacillate between wanting to do something on your own and wanting others' involvement. There's no use pressuring yourself unduly. As the day advances, you're more aware of your impact on the world, how you contribute, and how others see you as a contributor. Socially, there can be greater freedom, easier expression, and a sense that you can do almost anything. Friends are supportive and helpful.

You're in a productive, goal-oriented frame of mind most of the day, dear Sagittarius. This morning, a Moon-Mars aspect can trigger frustrations that have been simmering under the surface. Ideally, this influence helps you address a problem area, but watch out for doing so impatiently. As the day advances, there's easy energy for connections to people who make you feel comfortable or who have a reassuring effect on you. Relationships with current friends or acquaintances can improve. You are in no way afraid of controversy as a rule, but today, you wisely work around it, as you do all other distractions. Why bother with non-essentials now? You're onto bigger and better things!

The Moon encourages your lighter, more spontaneous side much of the day, dear Capricorn. This transit is not only about escaping the ordinary, but it's about expanding your experiences or your mind. A Moon-Mars opposition this morning can create a tense environment, largely due to distractions, a lack of focus, or too much information. It's easier to center yourself as the day advances. New or improved avenues for creativity can open up. You can also be quite drawn to healing techniques and self-improvement. The Moon moves to the top of your solar chart late today, and your overarching goals are strong on your mind.

The Moon spends a good part of the day in your sector of shared resources, dear Aquarius, and you're more observant than usual, seeing layers of situations that escaped your notice in the past. You crave a deeper approach or a feeling of connection. With a Moon-Mars opposition this morning, a passing whim may be seductive, or you could find yourself spinning your wheels. Ideally, the tension created now can spur you on and motivate you. However, this transit can also inflame money, business, or ownership matters, and the focus on complicated emotions can interfere with your productivity. As the day advances, it's easier to pull yourself out of this, and there can even be an emotional release or breakthrough. You're doing things differently, and it's working! The Moon heads into your spirit sector late today, and you're setting your sights high.

You're inclined to seek out balance in your life today, dear Pisces, but this morning, you could find yourself see-sawing before you get there. As well, someone could arouse defensiveness in you. However, consider that they may be showing a side of yourself or your unmet needs through your interactions. With a patient approach, you'll learn more about your desires and attachments, and as the day advances, there is strong energy for learning and for working to improve a system or project in your life. The key now is to enjoy the boost others give you without feeling that you're giving your personal power away.
